items.title: Stalking Victim Sues OpenAI, Claims ChatGPT Fueled Abuser's Delusions
items.summary: A stalking victim is suing OpenAI, alleging that ChatGPT provided information that exacerbated her abuser's delusions and that the company failed to act on her warnings.

items.title: Anthropic Launches 'Cowork' Desktop Agent for Claude, No Coding Required
items.summary: Anthropic has introduced Cowork, a new Claude Desktop agent designed to work directly with user files without requiring any coding expertise, enhancing accessibility for everyday tasks.

items.title: Railway Secures $100 Million to Build AI-Native Cloud Infrastructure, Challenging AWS
items.summary: Railway has raised $100 million to develop an AI-native cloud infrastructure, positioning itself as a direct competitor to established giants like AWS.

items.title: Nous Research Releases NousCoder-14B, an Open-Source Coding Model
items.summary: Nous Research has launched NousCoder-14B, an open-source coding model, entering the rapidly evolving landscape of AI-powered code generation tools.

items.title: Anthropic Temporarily Banned OpenClaw's Creator from Accessing Claude
items.summary: Anthropic temporarily suspended the creator of OpenClaw from using Claude, raising questions about API usage policies and the interaction between AI developers and platform providers.

items.title: Rethinking Generalization in Reasoning SFT: A Conditional Analysis on Optimization, Data, and Model Capability
items.summary: New research explores how optimization, data, and model capabilities conditionally influence generalization in reasoning-focused Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) for language models.

items.title: SkillClaw: Let Skills Evolve Collectively with Agentic Evolver
items.summary: SkillClaw introduces an 'Agentic Evolver' framework that allows AI agents' skills to evolve collectively, potentially leading to more robust and adaptable AI systems.

items.title: HY-Embodied-0.5: Embodied Foundation Models for Real-World Agents
items.summary: Researchers present HY-Embodied-0.5, a new embodied foundation model designed to enable real-world AI agents to perform complex tasks in physical environments.

items.title: Google Introduces New Ways to Balance Cost and Reliability in Gemini API
items.summary: Google has announced new features for the Gemini API, offering developers more flexibility to balance inference cost and reliability for their AI applications.

items.title: When Numbers Speak: Aligning Textual Numerals and Visual Instances in Text-to-Video Diffusion Models
items.summary: This paper investigates methods to improve text-to-video diffusion models by better aligning textual numerals with their corresponding visual instances in generated content.

items.title: ClawBench: Can AI Agents Complete Everyday Online Tasks?
items.summary: ClawBench introduces a new benchmark to evaluate the capability of AI agents in completing a wide range of everyday online tasks, assessing their practical utility.

items.title: MegaStyle: Constructing Diverse and Scalable Style Dataset via Consistent Text-to-Image Style Mapping
items.summary: MegaStyle proposes a method for creating diverse and scalable style datasets by consistently mapping textual descriptions to image styles in text-to-image generation.

items.title: Google AI to Create New Satellite Imagery Map for Protecting Brazil's Forests
items.summary: Google AI is developing a new satellite imagery map specifically designed to aid in the protection and monitoring of Brazil's vital forest ecosystems.

items.title: A Simple React Hook for Running Local LLMs via WebGPU
items.summary: A new React hook has been developed to simplify the process of running local Large Language Models directly in the browser using WebGPU, enhancing client-side AI capabilities.

items.title: "I Pointed Claude Code at My Local Ollama Models — Here's the 3-Minute Setup"
items.summary: A developer shares a quick guide on how to integrate Claude Code with local Ollama models, demonstrating an easy setup for leveraging powerful AI locally.
